title: PwShGUICore.psm1 — $script:_PathRegistry silently reset to @{} when module is re-imported with -Force mid-session
description: PwShGUICore.psm1 uses $script:_PathRegistry (populated by Initialize-CorePaths at startup) as a lookup table for all workspace paths. Any subsequent Import-Module PwShGUICore.psm1 -Force call (e.g. from PwSh-HelpFilesUpdateSource-ReR.psm1 line 79, or from external tools launched from Main-GUI.ps1) resets the module-scope variable to @{} because PS 5.1 re-executes the module body on every -Force import. After this reset, Get-ProjectPath returns $null for every key without recovering, causing downstream Test-Path $null crashes in at least six locations: Main-GUI.ps1 lines 7732, 7735, 7755 (Get-SecurityChecklistRows), 9822, ~3257 (Get-ScriptFoldersConfig), ~3274 (Save-ScriptFoldersConfig). The warning message emitted by the old Get-ProjectPath was also misleading ('call Initialize-CoreModule' instead of 'Initialize-CorePaths') and the -Message '' empty string passed to Write-AppLog from an earlier version caused a FATAL PS trap.
reported_by: User (Warning 'Path registry not initialized' followed by Test-Path null crashes in Security Checklist and Script Folders Config)
resolution: Get-ProjectPath now auto-reinitiates when $script:_PathRegistry.Count -eq 0: it derives the workspace root via Split-Path $PSScriptRoot (modules/ -> root), calls Initialize-CorePaths -ScriptDir $autoScriptDir, logs a Warning, then continues. If auto-reinit also fails (no config/ folder found) it returns $null with a clear error. Also fixed the misleading 'Initialize-CoreModule' text to 'Initialize-CorePaths'. VersionTag bumped to 2604.B2.V31.1.
detection_method: User-reported 'Path registry not initialized' warning followed by Test-Path crash. Analysis: Initialize-CorePaths is called once at Main-GUI.ps1:158. PwSh-HelpFilesUpdateSource-ReR.psm1:79 calls Import-Module PwShGUICore.psm1 -Force, resetting $script: scope. Equivalent -Force calls exist in tests and other modules.
root_cause: PS 5.1 re-executes the entire .psm1 body on every -Force import, reinitialising all $script: variables to their declaration defaults. No guard existed to recover or reinitialise the registry from context.

remedy_tracking.notes: Fixed in session 2026-04-13. Defence-in-depth: auto-reinit in Get-ProjectPath + null guards at call sites.
